title: CIE Orchestrator Task Context (Dispatch Payload)
description: Permissive schema for the accumulated context payload the Orchestrator injects into each DAG node at dispatch time. Unlike task.schema.json (which describes the full task envelope), this validates the flat accumulated_context that agents read directly (intent_object, prior node outputs, frozen_knowledge, dataset artifacts). Internally assembled and trusted, so it only asserts object shape.

execution_id.description: Parent execution context, bound to the capability token.

intent_object.description: The validated Intent Object produced by the Planner. Read-only for all downstream agents (ADR-0001).
